chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1689 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on CMA 6613/25 2.For orders on o/objections 3.For orders on CMA 6614/25 4.For orders on CMA 6615/25 5.For hearing of main case 01-10-2025 Mr. Manzoor Hussain Halepoto, Advocate along with petitioner. **** 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2to5. Counsel for petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant petition and submits that after curing some defects, he will file petition afresh. Order accordingly. This petition along with listed applications is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
